text.tspan: Outer setup differs by subcommand. The per-XR body is identical.
For each affected XR, CDP calls DP.DiffSingleResource. See per-XR body below.
PerformDiff iterates the input resources, calling DiffSingleResource on each. See per-XR body below.
per-XR body. DiffSingleResource(ctx, xr, compositionProvider). Driven once per input XR (xr) or once per affected XR (comp).

svg.text: RenderToStableState(ctx, xr, comp, fns, id, observed, eventualState)
